LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDamagedSunlamp.description: An ancient self-powered sun lamp. Its internal power supply is completely depleted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDamagedSunlamp.label: damaged sun lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDualHydroponicsBasin.descri: An ancient artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. Its core components have long been damaged and are now a pile of useless scrap iron.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDualHydroponicsBasin.label: ancient dual hydroponics
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientDispenser.descripti: An ancient nutrient solution dispenser that was used to process and convert nutrient ointments into nutrient solutions, and then transport nutrient solutions for hydroponic cultivation through a pipeline system. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientDispenser.label: ancient nutrient solution dispenser
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientPump.description: An ancient nutrient solution pump. This pump has been damaged.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientPump.label: ancient nutrient pump
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientSolutionFermenter.d: An ancient nutrient solution fermenter used to process a series of raw food or fertilizers in a fermentation tank and separate them to obtain nutrient solution. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientSolutionStorageTank: Ancient nutrient solution storage tanks. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSunlamp.description: An ancient self-powered sun lamp. Its shell is sturdy, and it was powered by a thermonuclear battery, now depleted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSunlamp.label: ancient sun lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClothCrate.description: Fake bolts of cloth stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClothCrate.label: cloth crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydro.description: An ancient artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. Its core components have long been damaged and are now a pile of useless scrap iron.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydro.label: damaged ancient hydroponics
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydroB.description: An ancient artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. Its core components have long been damaged and are now a pile of useless scrap iron.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydroB.label: damaged ancient hydroponics
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydroC.description: An ancient artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. Its core components have long been damaged and are now a pile of useless scrap iron.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydroC.label: damaged ancient hydroponics
LanguageData.VFEPD_DevilstrandCrate.description: Fake bolts of devilstrand stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DevilstrandCrate.label: devilstrand crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientDispenser.description: A nutrient solution dispenser used to process and convert nutrient ointments into nutrient solutions, and then transport nutrient solutions for hydroponic cultivation through a pipeline system. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientDispenser.label: nutrient solution dispenser
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientPipes.description: Steel nutrient pipes. These do not transport anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientPipes.label: nutrient pipe
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionCrate.description: Fake boxes of nutrient solution stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionCrate.label: nutrient solution crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionFermenter.descript: A nutrient solution fermenter used to process a series of raw food or fertilizers in a fermentation tank and separate them to obtain nutrient solution. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionFermenter.label: nutrient solution fermenter
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionStorageTank.label: nutrient solution storage tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurvivalNutrientPackCrateA.descrip: Fake boxes of survival nutrient paste packs stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurvivalNutrientPackCrateA.label: survival nutrient pack crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurvivalNutrientPackCrateB.descrip: Fake boxes of survival nutrient paste packs stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurvivalNutrientPackCrateB.label: survival nutrient pack crate
